# Data Model Checklist: Ingest property tax assessment data

**Purpose**: Ensure entities and fields cover normalization, linking, QA, and provenance.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/019-ingest-tax-assessments/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Core Entities

- [x] CHK-DM-001 Ingestion run entity captures run ID, status, timestamps, and trigger type.
- [x] CHK-DM-002 Assessment artifact entity stores metadata (year, publication date, coverage notes, license).
- [x] CHK-DM-003 Assessment record entity supports quarantine and invalid reasons.
- [x] CHK-DM-004 Linking results capture canonical location, method, confidence, and ambiguity.
- [x] CHK-DM-005 QA metrics capture coverage, invalid rate, outliers, and duplicates.

## Auditability

- [x] CHK-DM-006 Promotion outcomes and run warnings are captured per run.
